risks.description: Two separate location_cache.json files exist: field-desk (~11,211 retailer-heavy keys) and live-feeds (~43,522 event GPS keys). Future registry must reconcile, not merge blindly.
event-location-corrections-v01.js patches lat/lng at map runtime, bypassing registry/feed QA gates.
build-nightlife-pins.mjs (field-desk) and build_gps_repository.py / build_location_cache.py (live-feeds) can write location_cache.json.
live-feeds root radar JSON files are public map consumption surface; C5P publish script modifies them.
live-feeds live-sync-qa.yml and gps-staged-feed-integration-update.yml have contents:write and can modify protected files.
Phase 2E promotion report claims 25 cache writes; artifact rows still show promotion_performed=false — reconcile before G7.
live-feeds manual_gps_reference.json and nyc_parks_facility_reference.json referenced but absent.
642/897 tvpp rows unmatched; 249 possible matches; 2,157 GPS needs-review events in live-feeds — large review backlog.
web-platform WordPress plugin scaffold exists but is not activated; high risk if deployed without gates.

key_findings: Primary future registry home: live-feeds data/location_cache.json (~43,522 keys)
Secondary seed: field-desk data/location_cache.json (~11,211 retailer-heavy keys)
C5G audit: 6 exact, 249 possible, 642 unmatched of 897 tvpp needs-review rows
C5P published 1 approved geocode (row 914695); 896 needs-review blocked
Phase 2 GPS pipeline: 343 groups → 50 proposals → 42 filled → 25 approved → Phase 2E cache promotion
web-platform owns staging/operator gates and geocoding schemas; no location_cache in repo
Highest map risk: event-location-corrections-v01.js client-side coordinate patching
next_recommended_phase: XRI-G2 — Registry source inventory and candidate schema, report only
